mapper.select: SELECT b.*, e.ename FROM board b LEFT JOIN emp e ON b.emp_num = e.emp_num ORDER BY CASE WHEN b.category = '공지' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, b.board_num DESC
mapper.insert: insert into board (board_num, category, title, content, created_at) values (board_seq.nextval,#{category},#{title}, #{content}, sysdate)
mapper.select: select board_num, title, content from board where board_num = #{board_num}
mapper.update: update board set view_cnt = view_cnt + 1 where board_num = #{board_num}
updatd board set category = #{category}, title = ${title}, content = ${content}, updated_at = sysdate, where board_num = ${board_num}
